Surgical Procedure Notes — Laparoscopic Appendectomy: The patient, a 29-year-old female, underwent laparoscopic appendectomy under general anesthesia for acute appendicitis confirmed by CT imaging. Three-port technique was used; the appendix was found to be inflamed but not perforated, and was removed without complication. Estimated blood loss was less than 50mL; procedure duration was 42 minutes. Patient was transferred to the PACU in stable condition and discharged home the following morning with oral antibiotics and wound care instructions.
